tasks.name: Install surrealdb (SDK v2.0.0 / server v3.0.5+) + verify embedded mode
tasks.notes: RecordID not RecordId. No signin for surrealkv. query() returns flat list. BM25 scores negative. Multi-stmt returns LAST only.
tasks.validate: python3 -c "from surrealdb import Surreal, RecordID; db=Surreal('surrealkv:///tmp/t1check'); db.use('ns','db'); db.query('UPSERT test:1 SET x=1'); r=db.query('SELECT * FROM test'); c=db.query('SELECT count() FROM test GROUP ALL'); print('OK' if r and c else 'FAIL')"

tasks.name: Define schemas for all 5 tables + clusters
Build data migration script + quality validation
tasks.notes: 100% top-5 overlap on 20 queries. Small count mismatches from records written during 30min migration window.

tasks.name: Update search_pipeline.py + search_helpers.py
tasks.notes: Removed DAG merge block, _two_stage_search, lance_keyword_search refs. Added SurrealDB score fallback.

tasks.name: Update write_pipeline.py — remove DAG dual-write
tasks.notes: Removed DAG dual-write block, all tag_index.add_tags() calls, cleaned unused vars.

tasks.name: Replace tag_index + cluster_store with SurrealDB

tasks.name: Add RELATE graph edges for causal chains
tasks.notes: Added RELATE edges in record_attempt (tried_for), record_outcome (resolved/failed_on), remember_this (derived_from). Added traverse_graph + find_pattern MCP tools.

tasks.name: Update auxiliary servers + hooks
tasks.notes: Removed DAG memory layer promotion, lancedb backup/compaction, lancedb batch classification from session_end.py. Replaced statusline.py lancedb count with SurrealDB. Replaced analytics_server.py lancedb health+observations with SurrealDB.
tasks.validate: python3 -c "import importlib; [importlib.import_module(m) for m in ['hooks.session_end']]; print('OK')"

tasks.name: Rewrite test files

tasks.name: Cleanup — remove all LanceDB/DAG remnants
tasks.notes: Archived lance_collection.py, tag_index.py, cluster_store.py, dag_memory.py, dag_memory_layer.py. Inlined cluster_label. Removed tag_index/cluster_store params from pipelines. Updated web_search_server, orchestrator, memory_maintenance. Moved stale_memory_archiver + backup_embeddings + benchmark to archived.

tasks.notes: 13/14 pass, 1 skip (lancedb still installed). 1 timeout on remember_via_socket (NIM API latency, not migration-related). Connectivity, search, direct SurrealDB, imports all pass.
